---
title: "Jing Hai temp_website"
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

---
title: "Practice"
---

# Welcome

Hi! My name is Jing Hai.

I am a university student learning how to build websites using Quarto and GitHub Pages.

## Interests

- Technology
- Gaming
- AI
- Coding

## About This Website

This website was created for my lab assignment.
